name: BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan Low
notes: This Building Block identifies a low level of ICMP reconnaissance.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan Low on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
when the flow type is one of Superflow A, Superflow B, Superflow C
when the number of local hosts is greater than than 500
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan Low on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
AND when the flow type is one of Superflow A, Superflow B, Superflow C
AND when the number of local hosts is greater than than 500
